subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 784279167/251108305 is not a GRB
submitter: A. Holzmann Airasca at University of Trento and INFN Bari <a.holzmannairasca@unitn.it>
body:
A. Holzmann Airasca (UniTrento and INFN Bari) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 784279167/251108305 at 07:19:22.22 UT
on 08 November 2025, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
